healthy_description: Thick fleshy gray-green leaves in rosette clusters. Plump succulent leaves filled with clear gel. Yellow tubular flowers.

symptom_guide.symptom: Soft translucent mushy leaves and base
symptom_guide.visual_description: Plant becomes waterlogged and mushy, leaves feel spongy and collapse

symptom_guide.symptom: White cottony clusters on leaves and crown
symptom_guide.visual_description: Soft-bodied insects surrounded by white waxy coating, clustered at leaf bases

symptom_guide.symptom: Brown or orange spots on leaves
symptom_guide.visual_description: Small circular lesions scattered on foliage surface

symptom_guide.symptom: Leaves turning brown or black from base
symptom_guide.visual_description: Discoloration starts at soil line and moves up, plant may not recover
